title: (Bullish Signal) RETA, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling RETA's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 39 similar cases where RETA's MACD histogram became positive, and 32 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $91.04 crossed the support line at $88.98 and is trading between $94.57 resistance and $88.98 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/17/21 - 04/19/21, the price experienced a -25% Downtrend, while the week of 04/12/21 - 04/19/21 shows a +6% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/mzz4drsxgcu61.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=e5513ae405e268ba330c514151fca89e1e95258c

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 46 of 56 cases where RETA's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for RETA just turned positive on April 19, 2021. Looking at past instances where RETA's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 32 of 39 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

Following a +6.64% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where RETA advanced for three days, in 267 of 310 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

RETA may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
